intro: Between 16 and 27 April 2026, ZCyberNews published eight articles under the DDoS tag, covering four high-severity and three medium-severity incidents. Threat actors Dort and Mirai were observed targeting internet infrastructure, social media, technology, and telecommunications sectors across Canada, Germany, the Global region, and the United States. Key vulnerabilities included CVE-2025-29635, carrying a CVSS score of 8.8, and CVE-2024-3721, with a score of 6.3. One informational report was also included in this period.
